jobs.title: Indian Air Force MTS Vacancy 2026, Notification Out, Check How to Apply
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Keep a self-addressed envelope affixed with a ₹10 postage stamp
Superscribe the envelope with “APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF MTS” and send it to the address mentioned in the notification.
The application should be submitted to: Commandant, IAM, IAF, Vimanapura PO, Bangalore – 560017

jobs.title: Army Porter Akhnoor Vacancy 2026, Attend Porter Recruitment Rally
how_to_apply: First, download the official notification and read it carefully.
Check the eligibility criteria and required documents.
Go to the rally venue on the specified date and time.
Bring all original documents and photocopies.
Arrival time: Union Auditorium, Akhnoor, Jammu
Complete the physical test and document verification process.
jobs.jobs_info: Army Porter Akhnoor Vacancy 2026:The Indian Army will conduct the Porter Recruitment Rally from July 28, 2026, to July 30, 2026, at the Sangha Auditorium, Akhnoor. Selected candidates will be appointed for the period from September 1, 2026, to February 26, 2027. The total number of positions and salaries is not specified in this notice. There will be no online application process; instead, candidates will be required to appear directly at the recruitment site in their district on the scheduled date with all original documents.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Jammu District (Akhnoor, Arnia, Bahu, Bhalwal, Bishnah, Chowki Chora, Dansal, Jammu, Jammu North, Jammu South, Jammu West, Jourian, Khour, and nearby areas)
Jammu District (Maira Mandrian, Mandal, Marh, Nagrota, Pragwal, Ranbir Singh Pura, Suchetgarh) and Rajouri District
Poonch District, Other Districts of Jammu & Kashmir, and Candidates from Other States of India

selection_process: The recruitment selection process includes a preliminary written exam, a main written exam, an interview, document verification, and a medical examination. The selection process for Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://chandigarhpolice.gov.in/
Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage.
First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password.
After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable).
Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking].
Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors.
After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

jobs.jobs_info: Mahendergarh Health Department Vacancy 2026: Health Department Haryana Olo Civil Surgeon Mahendragarh at Narnaul. All the general public is informed that deployment of Domestic Breeding Checker on 30 posts in the District Malaria Office, Narnaul, is to be done on first come first serve basis for 06 months (June to 30 November 2026). Volunteers should apply only after clearly understanding that this is not a job but a form of community service on their part. For which only an honorarium of Rs 586/- will be given as per rules, and work will be taken for 20 days in a month; those volunteers who have worked as Domestic Breeding Checker for 5 years continuously will not be given work. This is not salary. Interested candidates may submit their documents (Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Bank Pass Book, Photocopy of Educational Certificate (Minimum 5th Class, etc. and 2 Passport Size Photographs) and Application Form by 22.07.2025 at the District Malaria Office, Narnaul, 2nd Floor, District Civil Hospital Narnaul by 04:00 PM.

how_to_apply: Notification padhein: Sabse pehle official notification PDF download karke poori tarah padh lein taaki eligibility aur requirements clearly samajh aa jaayein.
Resume/Bio-Data taiyar karein: Apna updated Bio-Data/resume banayein jisme educational qualification, experience (agar ho), aur personal details clearly likhi hon.
Documents attach karein: Apne educational certificates, age proof (Aadhaar/PAN), aur experience letters (agar applicable ho) ki self-attested scanned copies PDF format me ready rakhein.
Subject line sahi likhein: Email ka subject line clear rakhein — jaise “Application for the post of …………”.
Email bhejein: Apna Bio-Data aur documents email ke through mruesicfbd@gmail.com. par bhejein.
Confirmation ka wait karein: Shortlisted candidates ko interview/written test ki information email ke through hi bheji jaayegi.

jobs.jobs_info: Jal Shakti Vibhag Dharampur Circle Vacancy 2026: The Jal Shakti Department, Himachal Pradesh, has issued a recruitment notice for 30 Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker positions. Offline applications are invited for this recruitment. The deadline for submission is July 30, 2026, at 5:00 PM. Selected candidates will receive a monthly honorarium ranging from ₹6,000 to ₹7,100, depending on the position. Recruitment will be on a part-time basis, and selected candidates will be required to work six hours per day.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Candidate should have at least Matriculation (10th) with Certificate in the trade of ITI Electrician/Wireman/Diesel Mechanic/Pump Mechanic/Motor Mechanic/Pump Operator cum Mechanic from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th) with Certificate in the trade mentioned above/Income Certificate under Skill Development Scheme of Government and Candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe

Candidate should have at least Matriculation (10th) and ITI Certificate in the trade of Fitter & Plumber from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th)/Income Certificate along with Certificate in the above-mentioned trade under Skill Development Scheme of Government, and Candidates who belong to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe category should submit their category certificate (SC/ST).

Candidate must have a minimum qualification of Middle Pass or equivalent from a school recognized by the State Government/Income Certificate, and candidates belonging to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe category should submit their category certificate (SC/ST).

jobs.title: ICAR-NRCE Hisar Young Professional Recruitment 2026, Application Started
how_to_apply: Notification padhein: Sabse pehle official notification PDF download karke poori tarah padh lein taaki eligibility aur requirements clearly samajh aa jaayein.
Resume/Bio-Data taiyar karein: Apna updated Bio-Data/resume banayein jisme educational qualification, experience (agar ho), aur personal details clearly likhi hon.
Documents attach karein: Apne educational certificates, age proof (Aadhaar/PAN), aur experience letters (agar applicable ho) ki self-attested scanned copies PDF format me ready rakhein.
Subject line sahi likhein: Email ka subject line clear rakhein — jaise “Application for the post of …………”.
Email bhejein: Apna Bio-Data aur documents email ke through recruitment.nrce@gmail.com par bhejein.
Confirmation ka wait karein: Shortlisted candidates ko interview/written test ki information email ke through hi bheji jaayegi.

If required, bring the completed application form.

Form Download: Visit the official website or use the link below to download it.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Minimum 50% marks in M.Com (Commerce) from a recognized university. Candidates with an M.Com in Applied/Business Economics will not be eligible for this position. B.Ed. A degree from a recognized institute.

jobs.title: MCGMCH Narnaul Senior Resident Recruitment 2026, Appy Now
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.
The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.”
The application should be submitted to: Office of the Director, Maharishi Chyawan Government Medical College and Rao Tularam Hospital, Koriyawas, Narnaul (Haryana)
